reviews.review_title: BROKEN as broken can get.  Epic FAIL
reviews.review_description:
I was actually very excited when I saw this game/app listed on an obscure website that shows all of the new releases(unlike the Meta Store).  Because I have some eye issues that require strengthening exercises, similar to the ones I learned from a physiotherapist prior.  
So I thought this would be a great app for me.  
But I was INSTANTLY disappointed with it.  
I opted for the "Trial" version since it was offered.  
So I downloaded and installed it...then opened it.  
But all it was, was a green dot and a motionless cat underneath the dot.  
Anytime I moved my head, my face/view was plastered with a giant sign that said, "Don't Move Your Head".  So I didn't move my head...and a minute-and-a-half passed by...so I moved my head...and the GIANT MESSAGE flashed again in front of my view.  
The green dot stayed there...and the cat didn't move.  
I did this for another 5 minutes and gave up....more-so because the "Trial" time had expired.  
So I went the the Quest Store to rate this horrible app...but I couldn't rate it, because I didn't actually PURCHASE it.  
So I purchased it.  Then reinstalled the game, hoping that maybe the "purchased" version of the game would provide a better result.  
BUUUUUUUT it didn't.  Still unplayable.  
No menus...just a cat and a green dot...and a massive message of "Don't Move Your Head" whenever you moved your head(even if you didn't move your head for a couple of minutes).  

So this game/app is BROKEN as BROKEN can get.  Absolutely useless.  
I thought for a second, maybe it's the Meta v81 Update that broke this game.  But none of my other games have been affected by the v81 Update...so I can conclude that it's just THIS game that is BROKEN.  
I'll certainly be demanding a refund.  
I really wanted to have a good experience with this game, but that didn't happen.  I'll go even further, in the future, to never trust this game's Developer ever again.  EPIC FAIL.
